positive: Minimalist vector art design of a stylized mountain range silhouette under a vibrant, abstract aurora borealis. The mountains are sharp, clean, and monochromatic black, contrasting strongly against a gradient background of deep indigo, cyan, and electric purple. Geometric, crystalline elements can float around the peaks. Flat design aesthetic, highly stylized, clean vector look, centered composition, high contrast, perfect for apparel print, crisp details, no photorealism.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, blur, noisy, noise, text, logo, watermark, messy, jpeg artifacts, cartoon, sketch, low detail, grainy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, bad hands
